company.raw_notes: All searches for 'projectdomesday.com' and 'Project Domesday' return results about the historical 1986 BBC Domesday Project (a multimedia survey of the UK stored on LaserDiscs, led by Peter Armstrong) and related preservation/hobbyist communities (e.g., domesday86.com). None of these are connected to the signup domain projectdomesday.com. The org name 'Project Domesday' could be inspired by the original BBC initiative — a large-scale survey/documentation effort — but this is speculative.
